mapper.select: SELECT id, title, image_url AS imageUrl,type, sort, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM banner WHERE type = #{type} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, image_url AS imageUrl, type, sort, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM banner ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
